name: Tea Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Mix baking soda into buttermilk and self-rising flour separately.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients.
5. Form the mixture into large soft balls.
6. Roll the balls to be 1/8 inch thick.
7. Cut out shapes using a floured cutter.
8. Bake until light brown.
